title: Universal Modding Studio package manifest
description: Capability-aware envelope for a UMS-produced package. Legacy IDApTIK v1 kinds remain accepted for migration compatibility.

id.description: Stable lowercase-kebab identifier, unique across installed DLC.

kind.description: Broad package classification. gameplay-mechanic, puzzle-pack, scenario-definition, actor-pack and asset-pack are retained v1 compatibility aliases; profile-owned payload contracts define their internal meaning.

loads.description: Load point hint for the game loader (e.g. on-puzzle-screen, on-scenario-select).

exports.description: Named entry points the payload exposes.

wasm-modules.description: Paths (relative to the manifest) of compiled modules.

format.description: Profile-owned payload wire-format tag, e.g. idaptik-scenario/1 or idaptik-edit/1. Versioned independently of the manifest.

path.description: Payload file relative to the manifest.

payload.description: Where a profile-owned typed payload lives.

guarantees.description: Claim tags backed by verification evidence. A tag is not implicitly a machine-checked proof.

verification.description: Pointers to the evidence for each guarantee (test suites, soundness docs).

provides.description: Namespaced capabilities supplied by this package.
